note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

defendant.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

superior_court.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

district_court.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

county.guidance: A Maine county name without the word 'County' (e.g. Cumberland).

location_town.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

name.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

street_address.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).

city_state_zip.guidance: A US state — 'Maine' or the 2-letter 'ME'; match the box width.

charge.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

a_class_d.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

a_class_e_crime_or.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

a_civil_violation.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

inland_fisheries_wildlife_laws.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

marines_resources_laws.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

forest_service_laws_or.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

traffic_laws.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

fine_and_surcharge.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.

payment_address.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

defendant_signature.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.
